title: Remodeled Rabbit
body:
- Now the rabbits have a better model, the snouts, front foots, tails and textures have been changed.

Requires Optifine


- Easter eggs with nametag were added:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Bodoque
- Bugs
- Bunnymund
- Cinnamoroll
- Conterstine
- Cream
- Hopps
- Link
- Nivens
- Oswald
- Peppy
- Peter
- Quicky
- Roger
- Thumper
- Usadapekora
- Velveteen

</details>
